note: PARSER BASELINE (HYPOTHESIS — NOT a validated model). Every ⚑ below is an UNMEASURED estimate; hand-tune + record against a real fight before trusting any number. Remove this banner only when the unit has been measured/hand-tuned. || SLUG leona — Leona, SG / Burst II / Supporter / Water, ammo 9, reloadFrames 111, hitsPerShot 10 (pellets), normalMult 201.5, burstCd 20s. AUTHOR-mode kit-parse 2026-07-16 (wave 3): re-derived from official kit text, merged with the reviewed staging baseline (src/skills/overrides-baselines/leona.json), upgraded to the alliesOfWeapon target + unmodeled contract. The baseline's 'SG MAGNITUDE-CAPPED — SG core bands HR-contaminated' caveat is STALE (bands verified HR-clean; SG landing is per-unit with the class table as shipped default) and is DROPPED. PURE TEAM BUFFER: Supporter combat ATK 98,367, no self-damage kit lines — her value is crit/hit-rate/pellet buffs to shotgun allies, so correctness is a /sim-battery board diff on SG teams, NOT a self-sim. MODEL: (S1-Roar) 'after 5 normal attacks' — engine hitCount adds hitsPerShot=10 per PULL (sim.ts:1727), so 5 pulls = count:50; allies critRatePct 2.62, durationSec 5, maxStacks 5. The engine COMPUTES the live stack level from her cadence with shared-expiry ratcheting (applyBuff sim.ts:900-910: each re-application +1 stack AND refreshes the whole instance's 5s expiry; if expired, resets to 0). At the SG class rate (~1.5 pulls/s) a stack lands every ~3.3s of firing — inside the 5s window — so stacks ratchet toward 5 while firing, BUT the 9-round mag + 111f reload makes the across-reload trigger gap ~5.2s, marginally past expiry: stacks can reset across reload straddles. Steady state is therefore cadence-sensitive (folded into ⚑1), engine-computed, no haircut baked. (S2a) 'entering Full Burst' → fullBurstEnter (kit-literal, prior 10), allies, hitRatePct 20.28, 10s — HARD RULE 4: Hit Rate PROVENLY raises the core-hit rate; LIVE since CONE_DELTA (2026-07-19) for AR/SMG/SG recipients via acrForHR, in-game magnitude unmeasured (⚑2), never deleted. (S2b) 'Number of pellets ▲ 5 for 10 sec' to '2 ally unit(s) with the highest final ATK and a Shotgun' → fullBurstEnter, target alliesOfWeapon SG, normalAttackPct 50 (+5 pellets on the base-10 SG spread = +50% normal output; arcana-fortune-mate Happy-Memories encoding precedent, +1 pellet on base-10 = +10% normal), 10s. TWO approximations (⚑3): no top-ATK-with-weapon TargetDef exists, so the top-2 cap is dropped — applies to ALL shotgun allies incl. Leona herself (over-applies in 3+-SG teams; the weapon-typed target is chosen over alliesTopAtk:2 per the arcana-fortune-mate precedent — a weapon-blind top-2 would hand a spurious +50% normal buff to non-SG units in mixed/battery comps, unbounded wrongness vs the bounded within-class over-application); and +50% assumes ally base-10 pellets with the extra 5 landing at the same band fraction as the base spread. (Burst A) no activation clause, her OWN burst block → burstCast (prior 10), allies, critDamagePct 34.64, 10s. (Burst B) 'when Roar is at max stacks … all allies with shotguns' → burstCast, alliesOfWeapon SG (exact weapon-typed fit, no target approximation), critRatePct 21.32, 10s; the Roar-max-stacks gate is NOT expressible (no buff-stack-count gate in Block) → modeled UNCONDITIONAL, assumed satisfied at her cast (⚑4 — honest doubt: the reload-straddle stack resets above mean the gate may NOT reliably hold at her base solo cadence). SKIPS: S1 line B 'Maximum Effective Range ▲ 20% for 10 sec' (SG allies, after 15 normal attacks) → unmodeled.skill1 VERBATIM: no effective-range StatKey exists, the +30% range bonus is universally force-OFF in the engine (prior 2), and SG pellet landing is the fixed measured/calibrated SG_LANDING_BY_BAND table with no range-buff hook. NOT dropped as defensive — in reality it should raise SG-ally pellet landing at far bands (a real under-model, ⚑5); it does not change shots fired (hard-rule-1 check passed), it changes landing, which is engine-table-owned. No reload/ammo/heal/shield/DEF/HP/lifesteal/DoT/weapon-swap lines in this kit → hard rules 1-3 otherwise N/A; no damage riders → no noFb decision (prior 2); Water = clean ×1.10 engine-handled (prior 7). All FB/burst-gated blocks require a completed B1→B2→B3 chain — an enabler-less team fires none of them; the burst slot fires only on rotations LEONA casts (B2). ⚑1 CADENCE TUPLE (mandatory): pullsPerSec (SG class default ~1.5) / reloadFrames 111 / rolling-reload — datamine shipped unverified; Roar's engine-computed stack level AND the ⚑4 gate both inherit this. Recipe: rounds/min + reload gap from any focus video. ⚑2 HIT-RATE 20.28% → core/landing-rate magnitude (measured-only). Recipe: HR-on vs HR-off per-mag running-counter core/landing fraction on an HR-clean SG anchor during her FB window. ⚑3 PELLETS+5 ENCODING + SCOPE: estimate normalAttackPct 50 to all SG allies; true kit = +5 pellets to only the 2 highest-final-ATK SG allies. Recipe: focused SG ally popup/pellet-lattice count in vs out of Leona's FB window (15 vs 10 pellets), and check WHICH allies gain it in a 3+-SG team. ⚑4 ROAR-MAX BURST GATE assumed satisfied: estimate = unconditional (optimistic). Recipe: footage — at her burst cast, check the 21.32% crit-rate buff icon presence when Roar is visibly <5 stacks (e.g. right after a reload). ⚑5 EFFECTIVE-RANGE+20% modeling gap (unmodeled): estimate = no effect (band table as-is). Recipe: SG-ally per-mag landing-fraction deltas at far band with vs without Leona's 15-attack proc up. BLAST RADIUS: every effect is team-facing (crit rate ratchet + crit dmg to all, hit rate to all, +pellets and 21.32% crit to SG wielders) — run a /sim-battery diff before any board claim.
caveats: skill1: 'Maximum Effective Range ▲ 20%' to shotgun allies is not modeled — the engine has no range stat and shotgun pellet landing is a fixed measured table; real effect (better far-band landing) is a known under-model
skill2: Hit Rate ▲ 20.28% is modeled as hitRatePct — LIVE since CONE_DELTA (2026-07-19): feeds acrForHR core rate for AR/SMG/SG recipients; the in-game magnitude of the lift is unmeasured
skill2: '+5 pellets' is modeled as Normal Attack +50% to ALL shotgun allies (kit: only the 2 highest-ATK shotgun allies) — over-applies in teams running 3 or more shotguns, including Leona herself
burst: the 21.32% crit-rate line assumes Roar is fully stacked at her burst cast (the stack-count gate is not modeled and may not always hold)

skill1: ■ Activates after 15 normal attack(s). Affects all allies with a Shotgun.
